calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-14-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-14-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause was assigned to Dept. 218 from Dept. 206 to place terms of a settlement on the record as to Calvin Gray and for a Default Prove-Up Hearing as to John Scanlon.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: R. Edwards, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Francisco Torres, Esq. for Plaintiff: The John Stewart Company; Dirk Beszia, present, was sworn and examined. Also present was Calvin Gray. Terms of the settlement was placed on the record in the presence of defendant Gray. A settlement agreement and stipulation for judgment and possession was signed in open court.

As to John Scanlon: Prove-Up

Exhibit 1---Lease agreement -------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Three day notice ------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: John Scanlon as follows:
Principal $2,992.00
Costs $321.30 for a total of $3,313.00
Restitution of premises located at 364 Eddy Street, # 402

Judgment signed in open court. Exhibits were returned to plaintiff

payments.description: FIRST FILING UD COMPLT LESS THAN 2,500
